nodes.name: Long-tailed fantail
nodes.summary: The long-tailed fantail (Rhipidura opistherythra) is a species of bird in the family Rhipiduridae. It is endemic to the Tanimbar Islands, where its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References

nodes.name: Rhipidura
nodes.summary: Rhipidura（Rhipidura）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联59种鸟类，如Black fantail、Black-and-cinnamon fantail、Mindanao blue fantail等59种鸟类。

nodes.name: Long-tailed fantail
nodes.summary: Long-tailed fantail（Rhipidura opistherythra）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Long-tailed fantail。
